promoSubtitle: Treat Dad to the gift of relaxation — limited-time savings on his favorite treatments

services.name: King For A Day Package
services.description: The ultimate Father's Day treat! A full royal spa experience with a 30-minute aroma express massage, 60-minute men's facial, spa manicure and pedicure, and grooming — now just $189.
services.fullDescription:
Give Dad the royal treatment this Father's Day. This comprehensive package includes a 30-minute aroma express massage, a 60-minute men's facial, a spa manicure and pedicure, and grooming services tailored specifically for men's needs. The perfect way to help him relax, recharge, and feel completely pampered.

Includes:
• 30-minute aroma express massage
• 60-minute men's facial
• Spa manicure
• Spa pedicure
• Grooming services

services.name: Full Back and Shoulders Laser for Him
services.description: Smooth, groomed results for Dad! Complete back and shoulder laser hair removal in one convenient session — now just $170.
services.fullDescription: Our Full Back and Shoulders Laser treatment for men combines complete back and shoulder hair removal into one convenient session. Using advanced laser technology, this comprehensive treatment delivers smooth, uniform results across the entire back and shoulder area — long-lasting and low-maintenance, just in time for summer.

services.name: Men's Facial
services.description: A refreshing facial designed just for him. Targets razor burn, large pores, and oil control for healthy, refreshed skin — now just $85.
services.fullDescription:
Laura's signature skin treatment designed for gentlemen. This European facial addresses men's unique skin concerns including razor burn, excess oil, and enlarged pores.

Includes:
• Gentle exfoliating scrub
• Aromatherapy steam
• Neck, shoulder, and face massage
• Deep pore cleansing
• Firming mask
• Complimentary eyebrow trimming
• Complimentary earlobe waxing
benefits: Complimentary brow trim and earlobe wax

services.name: Full Relaxation Package
services.description: Help Dad unwind with a relaxing express facial, aroma facial massage, and his choice of massage or body scrub — now just $115.
services.fullDescription:
Relaxing express facial with aroma facial massage and your choice of massage or scrub for complete cleansing and relaxation. Aromatherapy facials use essential oils to promote healing and relaxation throughout the body — the perfect Father's Day reset.

Includes:
• Express aromatherapy facial
• Aroma facial massage
• Choice of massage or body scrub
